Video.summary: McCann uncovers an extortion scheme while investigating toxic waste dumping near Carver High School.
Video.title: Wasted

Video.summary: The death of a friend causes Fuller to worry about his age.
Video.title: Bad Day At Blackburn

Video.summary: Hoffs is the mentor for a high school student suspected of auto theft.
Video.title: Second Chances

Video.summary: Facing a desk job, baby-faced Hanson's only other option is to go back to high school - as an undercover cop.
Video.title: Pilot, Part 1

Video.summary: Facing a desk job, baby-faced Hanson's only other option is to go back to high school - as an undercover cop.
Video.title: Pilot, Part 2

Video.summary: Hanson and Penhall infiltrate a stolen car ring operating out of a high school auto shop.
Video.title: America, What A Town

Video.summary: Officer Hanson falls for his English teacher, who's also the object of others' desires.
Video.title: Don't Pet The Teacher

Video.summary: A girl's death forces Officers Hanson and Penhall to go undercover at the exclusive West Chadway Prep School.
Video.title: My Future's So Bright, I Gotta Wear Shades

Image.alt: My Future's So Bright, I Gotta Wear Shades
My Future's So Bright, I Gotta Wear Shades
My Future's So Bright, I Gotta Wear Shades
My Future's So Bright, I Gotta Wear Shades
My Future's So Bright, I Gotta Wear Shades
My Future's So Bright, I Gotta Wear Shades
My Future's So Bright, I Gotta Wear Shades
My Future's So Bright, I Gotta Wear Shades
My Future's So Bright, I Gotta Wear Shades

Video.summary: A pyromaniac at an all-girl school has undercover cop Judy Hoffs blazing a trail - to a prom-night inferno.
Video.title: The Worst Night Of Your Life

Image.alt: The Worst Night Of Your Life
The Worst Night Of Your Life
The Worst Night Of Your Life
The Worst Night Of Your Life
The Worst Night Of Your Life
The Worst Night Of Your Life
The Worst Night Of Your Life
The Worst Night Of Your Life
The Worst Night Of Your Life

Video.summary: Following his death, Captain Jenko's replacement leads the squad to the rescue of a school held hostage.
Video.title: Gotta Finish The Riff

Video.summary: A 16-year-old turns tricks for home security codes, leading Ioki on a trail of burglary and prostitution.
Video.title: Bad Influence

Video.summary: A sexually abused coed tries to hire Jump Street's Officer Hanson to kill her policeman father.
Video.title: Blindsided

Video.summary: Hanson is after a student loan shark, but risks his cover when his quiz team heads to the televised finals.
Video.title: Next Generation

Video.summary: Penhall goes undercover as a high school baseball jock to protect the school's pitching ace, a mobster's son.
Video.title: Low And Away / Running On Ice

Image.alt: Low And Away / Running On Ice
Low And Away / Running On Ice
Low And Away / Running On Ice
Low And Away / Running On Ice
Low And Away / Running On Ice
Low And Away / Running On Ice
Low And Away / Running On Ice
Low And Away / Running On Ice
Low And Away / Running On Ice

Video.summary: Penhall and Hoffs investigate a teenage modeling agency to arrest the leaders of a high school porno ring.
Video.title: 16 Blown To 35

Video.summary: Hanson goes "punk" to infiltrate rival gangs in an attempt to halt their destruction and rescue one member.
Video.title: Mean Streets And Pastel Houses

Video.summary: The Jump Street team goes undercover to investigate a suspected kidnapper Edison Coulter.
Video.title: In The Custody Of A Clown

Image.alt: In The Custody Of A Clown
In The Custody Of A Clown
In The Custody Of A Clown
In The Custody Of A Clown
In The Custody Of A Clown
In The Custody Of A Clown
In The Custody Of A Clown
In The Custody Of A Clown
In The Custody Of A Clown

Video.summary: A sixteen-year-old crack dealer is mysteriously murdered in the seedy world of narcotics and prostitution.
Video.title: Besieged, Part 1

Video.summary: After a wave of crack-related deaths, Penhall suspects that a hired outside police expert is responsible.
Video.title: Besieged, Part 2

Video.summary: The Jump Street squad puts a sting on a bar and cope with the drunk driving arrest of their own captain.
Video.title: Two For The Road

Video.summary: Fuller and Hoffs go undercover at a violent high school where both student and faculty carry lethal weapons.
Video.title: After School Special

Video.summary: loki faces a paternity suit and jail when a teen fingers him as the father of her child.
Video.title: Higher Education

Video.summary: Hanson and Hoffs try to diffuse the potentially explosive situation in the racially divided Burgard High.
Video.title: Don't Stretch The Rainbow

Video.summary: Hanson, Penhall, and loki investigate a rash of brutal assaults on gay men.
Video.title: Honor Bound

Video.summary: Officer Hanson is kidnapped endangering his life, and that of a Hollywood heartthrob he was sent to protect.
Video.title: You Ought To Be In Prison

Image.alt: You Ought To Be In Prison
You Ought To Be In Prison
You Ought To Be In Prison
You Ought To Be In Prison
You Ought To Be In Prison
You Ought To Be In Prison
You Ought To Be In Prison
You Ought To Be In Prison
You Ought To Be In Prison

Video.summary: Hoffs joins a gang to solve a drive-by shooting.
Video.title: Homegirls
